CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISBLANK(account__r.Approved_software_program__c)), ( IF(INCLUDES(account__r.Approved_software_program__c, "Approved CDM 8.1 extension (28-FEB-2025)"), "Approved CDM 8.1 extension (28-FEB-2025); ", "") & IF(INCLUDES(account__r.Approved_software_program__c, "Approved CDM 8.1 extension (30-APR-2025)"), "Approved CDM 8.1 extension (30-APR-2025); ", "") & IF(INCLUDES(account__r.Approved_software_program__c, "Approved CDM 8.1 extension (31-JUL-2025)"), "Approved CDM 8.1 extension (31-JUL-2025); ", "") ), IF( ISBLANK(Release_Version_End_Of_Support_Date__c), "EOS status not available", IF( Release_Version_End_Of_Support_Date__c < TODAY(), "Unsupported CDM software version", "Supported CDM software version" ) ) )
CustomField.label: CDM End of Support Status
